stories.title: NFCA Week 9 Poll Preview — Alabama Poised to Rise, Texas to Fall (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The NFCA Week 9 poll drops tomorrow morning.

Alabama just beat No. 1 Texas and took the series. Oklahoma is 38-3. FSU has won 24 straight.

The rankings are about to look very different. #SECSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Texas was No. 1 for weeks. Alabama just took their series.

The Week 9 NFCA poll drops Tuesday at 10 AM ET. Expect the Crimson Tide to leap — and Texas to take a fall.

WCWS seeding is on the line. #SECSoftball #CFASoftball

article.headline: NFCA Week 9 Poll Preview: Alabama's Surge Sets Up Most Dramatic Rankings Drop of 2026

stories.title: Red River Rivalry Is Here — Texas vs. Oklahoma April 10-12 (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
The Red River Rivalry is four days away.

Texas (32-4) vs. No. 3 Oklahoma (38-3). McCombs Field. April 10-12. ESPN2/ESPN.

Kendall Wells is one HR from the all-time NCAA freshman record. The Longhorns are licking wounds.

This series has everything. #TexasSoftball #Sooners

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells has 30 home runs.

The NCAA freshman record? 30. Tied.

She gets her shot at No. 31 at the Red River Rivalry — April 10-12 at McCombs Field. #Sooners #SECSoftball

article.headline: Red River Rivalry Preview: Texas and Oklahoma Set for Series That Could Define 2026

stories.title: Kendall Wells — One HR From Making History Outright (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The three players who hold the NCAA freshman HR record: Lauren Chamberlain. Jocelyn Alo. Kelly Majam.

Kendall Wells just joined them at 30.

She needs one more to stand alone. #Sooners

article.headline: Kendall Wells Is One Home Run From Making NCAA Freshman History Outright

stories.title: FSU's 24-Game Win Streak — Can Anyone Stop the Seminoles? (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Florida State trailed Notre Dame 4-0.

Then they scored eight unanswered runs.

The win streak is now 24 — the nation's longest. FSU is 34-4 and 12-0 in the ACC. #FSUSoftball

article.headline: FSU's 24-Game Win Streak Is the Nation's Longest — and the Seminoles Are Just Getting Started

stories.title: Kylee Edwards Hits for the Cycle — First in LSU History (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Kylee Edwards just made LSU softball history.

Home run. Single. Double. Triple.

The first cycle in 46 years of LSU softball. She did it in a 16-4 win over Missouri on Friday. #LSUSoftball #SECSoftball

article.headline: Kylee Edwards Hits for the Cycle — First in 46 Years of LSU Softball History

stories.title: Alabama After the Upset — What's Next for the Tide and the SEC? (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Alabama's first series win over a No. 1 since 2016.

Katie Stewart hit two home runs in the clincher. The Crimson Tide are 34-3 and building a WCWS case.

The SEC just got a lot more interesting. #RollTide #SECSoftball

Buckle up. #CFASoftball
